approaches.name: Approach 1, manual calibration baseline
approaches.summary: Fixed coordinates from manual calibration, direct darkness readout, NULL on low margin.

approaches.name: Approach 2, fixed-template registration + intensity reading
approaches.summary: Affine ECC registration to a canonical template, then read the canonical bubble grid.

approaches.name: Approach 3, timing-mark anchored registration
approaches.summary: Use detected right-edge timing marks to set each row Y position, then read fixed answer columns.

best_observed.name: Approach 3, timing-mark anchored registration
best_observed.summary: Use detected right-edge timing marks to set each row Y position, then read fixed answer columns.
